metadata.task_title: Convert a file (Excel) into a CSV file
metadata.instruction: Export the Task ID 59.xlsx in Documents > Task 59 folder to .csv and move it to Desktop.
metadata.context: I need to convert and export the Books Excel spreadsheet.

actions.window_title: C:\Windows\system32\cmd.exe - python  -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel(r'C:\Users\ananyagm-admin\Documents\Task 59\Task ID 59.xlsx'); df.to_csv(r'C:\Users\ananyagm-admin\Desktop\Task ID 59.csv', index=False); print('Successfully converted!')"
